arts.ttl: Man City’s €100m transfer plan after Rodri injury
arts.sum: Manchester City are plotting a move for Jamal Musiala of Bayern Munich to replace injured midfielder Rodri . TeamTalk reports that Man City lead the race for Musiala ahead of Real Madrid, Manchester United, Liverpool and Chelsea.

arts.ttl: ‘I feel for him’: Dermot Gallagher issues honest verdict on Leandro Trossard’s red card vs Man City
Arteta opts 'not to comment' on Trossard red card at Manchester City – video
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta remained tight-lipped in a press conference after Manchester City's 2-2 draw with Arsenal at the Etihad Stadium. When asked about Leandro Trossard's second yellow card for kicking the ball away after a foul, the Arsenal manager said: 'I'm expecting now 100 Premier League games to be played 10 against 11 or 10 against 10 or 9 against 10.' It is the second time this season that an Arsenal player has been sent off for kicking the ball away after Declan Rice was dismissed against Brighton. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Rodri ACL tear: How long does an anterior cruciate ligament injury take to heal?
arts.sum: Rodri ACL tear: How long does an anterior cruciate ligament injury take to heal? Manchester City midfielder Rodri is feared to be the latest high-profile footballer to have suffered a torn ACL.

arts.ttl: Arsenal suffer fresh injury blow after David Raya spotted leaving Man City clash
arts.sum: Arsenal goalkeeper David Raya was seen limping with a bandaged right knee following thrilling draw against Manchester City to give Mikel Arteta another concern

arts.ttl: Michael Oliver 'should have disallowed' Arsenal goal in Man City draw says ex Prem referee
arts.sum: The Gunners were leading 2-1 at the Etihad Stadium before John Stones equalised in the 98th minute

arts.ttl: Kyle Walker points finger at Michael Oliver as he opens up on angry Man City exchange
arts.sum: Manchester City's Premier League draw with Arsenal wasn't without controversy and captain Kyle Walker has queried one particular decision from referee Michael Oliver

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland appears to make foul-mouthed dig at Arsenal youngster during bust-up
arts.sum: Erling Haaland had a fiery afternoon as Manchester City drew with title rivals Arsenal on Sunday, with the striker clashing with Gunners players after the final whistle

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland provokes Mikel Arteta with two-word message during fiery handshake
arts.sum: Haaland told Arteta to ‘stay humble’ after Manchester City rescued a 2-2 draw against their title rivals

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola issues injury update on Rodri and Kevin de Bruyne
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola cut a frustrated figure on Sunday evening as he reflected on an action-packed draw with Premier League title rivals Arsenal. Guardiola conceded that Arsenal were “so strong mentally” to withstand for so long, strengthening their title ambitions.
